title: collospermum montanum
intro: Collospermum montanum, also known as the Mountain Lily, is a flowering plant native to New Zealand. The plant has been used in traditional Maori medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Collospermum montanum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and provide antimicrobial protection. The plant can be prepared for medicinal use through herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
